name: PT Gozco Plantations Tbk
summary: PT Gozco Plantations Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, develops and operates oil palm plantations. It is also involved in the processing of crude palm oil and palm kernel; and production of fruit bunches for distribution in Indonesia. The company was formerly known as PT Surya Gemilang Sentosa and changed its name to PT Gozco Plantations Tbk in December 2007. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
